title: Wishing Fountain
description: Offer a more immersive and gentle way to search for destinations
body:
## Introduction
This mod adds a multiblock structure and two key items (Buddelschiff) that allow players to obtain location maps (for biomes or structures) through wishing, as well as change weather conditions.

Wishing requires specific material combinations. A wish will only succeed if there's a corresponding recipe for the target. The mod includes default recipes for vanilla biomes and structures. Modpack authors need to create recipes for modded targets.

### Build the Wishing Fountain
![Wishing Fountain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mp9ceiLG/images/e79b4bf41dcfd4038a8bbef97cff7438939e3c66.png)

### Search for the destination
![Searching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mp9ceiLG/images/ee8695194ed56e3902fcf9b28db669269c826dfe.png)

For details on the construction and usage of the Wishing Fountain and the search destination for custom buddelschiff, please refer to [Github](https://github.com/poisonsheep/Wishing-Fountain).
